sql_array: CREATE TABLE statistics (id INT, value1 FLOAT, value2 FLOAT);
INSERT INTO statistics (id, value1, value2) VALUES (1, 2.5, 3.5), (2, NULL, 4.1), (3, 5.0, 5.0), (4, 6.0, 7.0);
SELECT REGR_SXY(value1, value2) FROM statistics WHERE NOT value1 IS NULL GROUP BY id HAVING REGR_SXY(value1, value2) > 0;
SELECT REGR_SXY(NOT (value1 < 5), value2) FROM statistics WHERE value2 IS NOT NULL GROUP BY value2 ORDER BY REGR_SXY(NOT (value1 < 5), value2) DESC;
CREATE TABLE edge_cases (id INT PRIMARY KEY, num_col NUMERIC(10, 5), char_col CHAR(5));
INSERT INTO edge_cases (id, num_col, char_col) VALUES (1, 12345.67890, 'test1'), (2, NULL, 'test2'), (3, 0, '');
SELECT REGR_SXY(CAST(NOT (num_col > 1000) AS INT), LENGTH(char_col)) FROM edge_cases WHERE NOT char_col IS NULL GROUP BY id HAVING REGR_SXY(CAST(NOT (num_col > 1000) AS INT), LENGTH(char_col)) = 0;
SELECT REGR_SXY(num_col, NULL) FROM edge_cases WHERE NOT (char_col IS NULL) GROUP BY num_col HAVING REGR_SXY(num_col, NULL) IS NULL;
SELECT REGR_SXY(CAST(char_col AS FLOAT), num_col) FROM edge_cases WHERE NOT char_col = '' GROUP BY id;
SELECT REGR_SXY(NOT (num_col IS NULL), CAST(num_col AS VARCHAR)) FROM edge_cases GROUP BY id HAVING REGR_SXY(NOT (num_col IS NULL), CAST(num_col AS VARCHAR)) > 0;
